steps.title: Identify the starting area and removal rate
steps.content: The large square has area 36 cm². Each small square removed takes away 4 cm². If we remove $x$ small squares, then the total area removed is $4x$ cm².

steps.title: Write the function for remaining area
steps.content: The remaining area equals the starting area minus what was removed. A quick Desmos table makes the model automatic: after $0$, $1$, and $2$ cuts, the areas are $36$, $32$, and $28$. Linear regression gives slope $-4$ and intercept $36$, so $$f(x)=36-4x$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
